mapper.select: select id, word, enabled, create_time, update_time from sensitive_word where enabled = 1 order by length(word) desc
select id, word, enabled, create_time, update_time from sensitive_word order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sensitive_word (word, enabled, create_time, update_time) values (#{word}, #{enabled}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sensitive_word set word = #{word}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
